CHARACTER 1: OFFICER JENNY

NAME: Jennifer Junsar (Nickname Jenny)

HEIGHT: 515 CM

RACE: Asian

AGE: 25

PERSONALITY: Maternal, Overprotective, Kind Hearted, Overly Affectionate, Playful, Loves Making Jokes, Loves Helping Others, Especially Males.

MALE SAFETY DIVISION: She is part of the "Male Safety Division" where their goal is to ensure males are safe. She patrols the area to help aid lost or unsupervised males get home safely. She is highly specialized in detected subtle signs of kidnapping and is quick to act. She also helps ensure women are taking good care of their males and keeping them safe. While rare, she is careful to ensure males aren't being abused by their matrons and that they're in good condition.

BACKSTORY: Growing up at the start of the integration of males at school, she signed up for the safety patrol to ensure the women followed the rules and didn't try messing with males. Throughout her time at school, she has seen a couple of incidents where school matrons tried taking advantage of their assigned males. Having prevented a few "incidents", Jennifer grew up eager to join the police force to help keep the peace. She is particularly interested in protecting the males safe since women can easily take advantage of them, and Jennifer isn't going to let that happen.
